anthropic-software-engineer-claude-code.rationale: Anthropic — Software Engineer, Claude Code. Literally builds with Claude Code daily. Expert in agentic-workflows, prompt-engineering, LLM, full-stack. Perfect fit.

schoolai-fullstack-software-engineer.rationale: SchoolAI — Fullstack Software Engineer. Expert full-stack + edtech domain + AI skills. Strong match elevated by complete skill coverage.

npr-senior-ai-engineer-ai-labs.rationale: NPR — Senior AI Engineer, AI Labs. Expert LLM, prompt-engineering, agentic-workflows, API design, production systems. AI engineering core competency.

deeprec-ai-senior-agentic-ai-engineer.rationale: DeepRec.ai — Senior Agentic AI Engineer. Agentic-workflows expert with 1098 sessions. This is the candidate's primary domain.

motion-recruitment-sr-react-three-js-unr.rationale: Motion Recruitment — Sr. React/Three.js/Unity/WebGL. Has React, Three.js, Unity, WebGL, creative-tools all detected. Niche match now fully evidenced.

arcadia-senior-software-engineer-ai-agen.rationale: Arcadia — Senior Software Engineer (AI Agents). Expert agentic-workflows, prompt-engineering, system-design. Core competency match.

change-org-senior-staff-software-enginee.rationale: Change.org — Senior Staff Software Engineer, AI and Tools. Expert developer-tools, agentic-workflows, full-stack, system-design. Strong Sr Staff match.

microsoft-member-of-technical-staff-seni.rationale: Microsoft — Senior Applied AI Engineer. Strong AI + production systems + system-design. Not A+ due to Microsoft-specific infra expectations.

backflip-ai-senior-ai-systems-engineer-a.rationale: Backflip AI — Senior AI Systems Engineer (Agents & Reasoning). Strong agentic match. Unchanged — was already correct.

cohere-senior-software-engineer-agent-in.rationale: Cohere — Senior Software Engineer, Agent Infrastructure. Expert agentic-workflows + infrastructure skills. Previously underrated at B- with only 15 skills visible.

product-ai-software-engineer-ai-commerce.rationale: Product.ai — Software Engineer, AI Commerce. Unchanged — AI + full-stack match.

staffing-science-senior-staff-software-e.rationale: Staffing Science — Senior/Staff Software Engineer (Agentic). Unchanged — strong agentic match.

kiddom-machine-learning-engineer.rationale: Kiddom — Machine Learning Engineer. Has ML, data-science, LLM. But ML engineering specialization (model training, PyTorch depth) is secondary to agentic/platform work.

adobe-senior-software-development-engine.rationale: Adobe — Senior Software Development Engineer. Expert full-stack, system-design, production-systems, API design. Strong SDE match.

milwaukee-brewers-senior-software-engine.rationale: Milwaukee Brewers — Senior Software Engineer (Baseball Systems). Strong SWE skills match but baseball/sports analytics domain is not evidenced.

adobe-senior-customer-facing-applied-ai-.rationale: Adobe — Senior Customer Facing Applied AI Engineer. AI skills strong, customer-facing aspect partially covered by communication/collaboration soft skills.

imbue-product-engineer.rationale: Imbue — Product Engineer. Strong AI + product skills. Imbue focuses on AI agents — good alignment.

fullstack-principal-agentic-engineer.rationale: FullStack — Principal Agentic Engineer. Agentic expert but principal level may require deeper distributed systems or team leadership evidence.

interplay-learning-principal-react-engin.rationale: Interplay Learning — Principal React Engineer. Has React + frontend-development + full-stack. Elevated from B — the 76-skill profile shows broader frontend competency.

substack-full-stack-product-engineer-cre.rationale: Substack — Full Stack Product Engineer. Expert full-stack, product-development, API design. Good match.

suno-staff-software-engineer.rationale: Suno — Staff Software Engineer. Music/audio domain not in profile. General SWE skills match but domain gap.

the-walt-disney-company-software-enginee.rationale: Disney — Interactive Visualization. Has creative-tools, WebGL, Three.js, Unity. Previously C+ was too low — these skills are now visible.

microsoft-ai-sr-principal-product-manage.rationale: Microsoft AI — Sr. Principal Product Manager. Not a PM — engineering-focused profile. But AI domain knowledge, metrics, product-development skills overlap. B is right floor.

the-walt-disney-company-sr-staff-r-d-eng.rationale: Disney — Sr Staff R&D Engineer. R&D research focus doesn't match practitioner/builder profile. Has creative-tools but lacks research methodology evidence. B is appropriate.
